title: Widget extension target in project.yml
description: Add the AggregatorWidget app-extension target to project.yml: type app-extension, platform iOS, deployment 26.0, PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER: net.renalias.AggregatorApp.AggregatorWidget, same development team, App Group and Keychain entitlements. Declare it as an embedded dependency of AggregatorApp so Xcode embeds the .appex in the app bundle. Create the AggregatorWidget/ directory. Run xcodegen generate.
acceptance_criteria: project.yml defines AggregatorWidget target with correct type, platform, and bundle ID
AggregatorApp declares AggregatorWidget as an embed dependency
xcodegen generate succeeds and the AggregatorWidget/ group appears in the generated project
Empty widget extension compiles and links without errors
